description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job called test that runs in the default test stage using the default Docker image. The job should execute the following shell commands in order: export DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=test_settings, apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y python-dev python-pip, pip install -e ., and py.test -v. No caches, artifacts, variables, or special rules are required, and the job runs on every pipeline execution.
